failure_details: The exact environment-scrubbed Genkit LLMObs suite passed in one run. All five selected LLMObs kinds and their reviewed exact-version behavior are covered. outside_stage_21: Native Genkit OpenTelemetry versus Datadog APM duplicate-span behavior requires the final instrumented real-app observability gate.
Supported-provider LLMObs duplication and token ownership require a trustworthy provider identity and final live trace evidence; action names alone are insufficient.
A compatibility range broader than exact 1.21.0 requires separate cross-version evidence.
